name: vibe-coding-guardrails
description: Pure skills for AI development governance in Codex: project initialization, risk gates, design review, code review, test planning, security review, and release checks.

interface.longDescription: Initialize project-specific AI development guardrails, classify task risk, review designs and code, plan tests, review security, and check release readiness. Pure skills only: no hooks, no MCP, no app connectors.
